blocker_1_fix.issue: DegradationCenter PAUSE_TRADING was only state, no hard gate
blocker_1_fix.fix: Added hard gate in run_loop() before symbol processing: if degradation_center.get_current_strategy() == DegradationStrategy.PAUSE_TRADING: log.warning(); await asyncio.sleep(3); continue

blocker_2_fix.issue: RiskOfficer and CircuitBreaker tracked daily_pnl/consecutive_loss independently
blocker_2_fix.fix: RiskOfficer is authoritative source. Added CircuitBreaker.sync_from_risk_officer() method. After each trade close/partial exit, sync CircuitBreaker FROM RiskOfficer.

halt_authority_runtime: DegradationCenter(hard gate) > CircuitBreaker(continue) > RiskOfficer(can_enter). All three enforced in runtime.
